watching.text: Riversol — winback full rebuild due before Monday 1pm. Skin analyzer webhook on hold. Ali + Una call imminent.

Hiba — forms all working, pop-up offline. Michael validation email still pending.
Epicure — June 1 start. Kieran handling flow builds. Builder gap accepted.
FRNK — Shopify theme live. June campaign calendar running. Giveaway live.
SFR Distillery — proposal sent May 28. Awaiting client response.
OuterSignal — kickoff call Monday 10am. Dov Quint. Lawrence + Thomas setting up agreement.
Liverpool — final week. Offboarding complete. Archive only.

activity.text: Sunday wind-down sweep — calendar, inbox, client pulse checked. Big week ahead: OuterSignal kickoff, Epicure start, Riversol call, Lab Life kickoff.
Riversol winback copy rebuild flagged as highest priority — due before Monday 1pm call with Ali + Una.
Salehe June 4 deadline at risk — Shopify sync blocked (technical + billing). Fardad activation still pending.
The Lab Life kickoff Wednesday 7am — no Day 1 plan built yet. Needs brief before Wednesday.
RVCA welcome series build due — confirm Victoria/Meaghan ownership. Clay approved sign-up form.
The Lab Life SIGNED. Salehe contract signed + customer list sorted 79k. FRNK Steph meeting done. Riversol intel brief built for Notion.
